clues.clue: Manifest impatience that I bet wrongly on winner
Extensive note put in record
A member of corps on dock finally dropped in the shade
Came across entertaining American lounge singer
That woman, married, proved old-fashioned
Rewritten document is about politician with feeblest case
Leave to be sick, but not very
This blocks sibilant in front of mouth?
Show of green largely amid crop
Allot gold “star”
Not so good to contribute to a little light teasing
Return of service plus extra run covering great area
Stick by hot tub
Donning hat, set out for Brief Encounter
Helpful craftsman, local, scratching head
Dread carnage, on and off street
Look with difficulty round a small publisher, in this?
More than one fine lady at first clothed in real delicacy
Carries items on back of camel
City pub Charlie alone wrecked
One full of alcohol perhaps is expelled from Arab city
Saver confused with deceit is gutted
Naughty lad on cocaine initially had to swear
Being late, celebrity cycling round has something to eat
Disappear, having run in for coat
Minute hands, in relation to face?
Scales not fully calibrated
Answer the same as before? Bother!
